tasks.description: Create the ./i18n/ directory to store all translated README files.
tasks.acceptance-criteria: Directory ./i18n/ exists and is ready for file creation.

unit: Directory ./i18n/ exists with proper permissions

tasks.task: Add language navigation to main README.md
tasks.description: Insert multilingual navigation badges after the title and before Introduction section in README.md.

steps.description:
Insert language badges between

and ## Introduction

tasks.acceptance-criteria: README.md contains all 15 language navigation badges after the title paragraph and before ## Introduction section. Each badge links to correct i18n file path.

unit: README.md contains badge for each language (zh-TW, zh-CN, ja, ko, es, fr, pt-BR, it, id-ID, de, ru, uk, tr, ar, vi)
All badges have correct links to ./i18n/README.xx.md files
e2e-manual: Visual inspection: badges display correctly with proper colors and labels

tasks.description: Translate README.md to Traditional Chinese with natural local expressions and add multilingual navigation.

steps.description: Translate all content to Traditional Chinese

tasks.acceptance-criteria: File ./i18n/README.zh-TW.md exists with full Traditional Chinese translation using natural local expressions. Contains all 15 language navigation badges with correct links.

unit: File exists at ./i18n/README.zh-TW.md
File contains complete translation of all sections
All code blocks and technical terms remain in English
Language navigation badges present with correct links
e2e-manual: Native speaker review: translation is natural and accurate
